title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: The native Version works perfectly. Don't try to run this game through proton or else it won't launch at all. If you encounter a prompt stating that csgo isn't responding on startup while running the native version try adding -nojoy to the launch options. The prompt will still appear then but if you give it some time it will start anyways.
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: Had a black screen so I had to upgrade to beta then go back to base, worked for a few minutes then it crashed. -nojoy didn't work unless I went into the beta again, enabled it, then went back to base. Very strange.
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes:
the antive version works really well, but it's a pain in the but when you have a dual monitor setup, the game launch on the wrong display... here is how i fixed it:
launch options: SDL_VIDEO_MINIMIZE_ON_FOCUS_LOSS=0 %command% -nojoy

ingame console: sdl_displayindex 0 (try -1 or 1 and relaunch the game every times to see if this change anything)

also, can't change the default output audio device on the linux version (we can do that on the windows version, i miss this :( )
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: Works fine out of the box. Might need to add -nojoy to launch options if the game crashes at launch
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: The game runs perfectly. Out of game tweaks: Fully disable mouse acceleration as it persists in-game even if it's disabled on the desktop, also disable compositing through the launch options by adding "xfconf-query -c xfwm4 -p /general/use_compositing -s false; %command%; xfconf-query -c xfwm4 -p /general/use_compositing -s true"
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: There is a prompt when launching the game which states that csgo_linux64 is not responding. Wait it out until you see a csgo logo then you can click wait in the prompt.
title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

notes: After having issues with both native and Protonfied, I´ve managed to make it work flawlessly. Surely due to my Keyboard with controller input (Wooting One), It was causing issue with the game. -nojoy launch setting fixed that issue directly.
